story.title: Born from a love of Nordic nature
story.p1: Robust Nordic makes high-quality supplements and wellbeing products that genuinely help. We believe wellbeing is built from nature's own building blocks – clean, scientifically proven ingredients.
story.p2: Our products are made in the Nordics with over 50 years of experience, in BRCGS-certified production with an AA grade. We focus on natural ingredients and scientifically researched raw materials – so we can offer you the best possible product.
story.imageAlt: Hands full of foraged Nordic wild berries: lingonberries and blueberries

features.qualityDesc: Quality assurance from start to finish. Every batch is tested for purity and potency.
features.safeDesc: Carefully tested ingredients. Certified production and full traceability.
features.easyDesc: Fast ordering and smooth delivery. Free shipping on orders over €50.
features.goodDesc: Part of the profit goes to good causes. We support Nordic nature conservation.

quality.certBody: The highest international standard for food safety and quality. Our products are made in the Nordics with over 50 years of experience in certified production.

storyPage.metaDescription: Robust Nordic was born from a simple idea: wellbeing shouldn't rest on flashy marketing promises, but on products whose quality you can genuinely trust.
storyPage.title: Our story
storyPage.turningPoint: We decided to do things differently.
storyPage.p1: Robust Nordic was born from a simple idea: wellbeing shouldn't rest on flashy marketing promises, but on products whose quality you can genuinely trust.
storyPage.p2: Over the years we noticed the same problem again and again. New supplements kept arriving on the market, but their contents, origin and amounts of active ingredients varied widely. It was hard for consumers to tell what was truly a quality product and what was just marketing.
storyPage.p3: Robust Nordic was founded to build a wellbeing brand where every product is designed from a single starting point: it must offer the customer real benefit. We don't choose ingredients based on price, but on quality, scientific evidence and effectiveness.
storyPage.p4: The Nordic mindset shows in everything we do. We value purity, transparency, honesty and a long-term approach. That's why our products are made in certified production, from carefully selected ingredients and under strict quality control.
storyPage.p5: Robust Nordic is not, however, just a supplement company. We are building a comprehensive wellbeing brand aimed at helping people feel better every day. We constantly develop new products to support wellbeing, beauty and health, but one thing never changes: we don't launch a product we wouldn't believe in ourselves.
storyPage.p6: The trust of thousands of customers is the greatest sign to us that we are on the right path. It motivates us to keep improving our products and to hold on to the values from which Robust Nordic was originally born.
storyPage.p7: We believe wellbeing is built from small daily choices. We want to help make them a little easier – with quality products you can trust.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Robust Nordic makes high-quality, natural supplements in certified production. Get to know our story and values.
aboutPage.title: Wellbeing without compromise
aboutPage.p1: We are a group of passionate wellbeing developers who, from the very start, had a clear vision: to offer high-quality, natural and effective supplements without compromise. Robust was born from a desire to combine research-based knowledge with clean, carefully selected ingredients.
aboutPage.p2: We make our products using only the best and proven-effective ingredients – without unnecessary fillers and additives such as magnesium stearate. We also use Nordic berries and mushrooms in our products, whose nutritional richness and quality are unmatched. Every production batch is carefully tested so we can guarantee the purity and effectiveness of our products.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Made with Nordic precision, following the highest quality standards.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Only the most bioavailable and proven-effective ingredients – without unnecessary fillers.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We openly tell you what's in our products and why. No hidden ingredients.
aboutPage.value4Desc: The highest international level of food safety in every production batch.

contactPage.metaDescription: Our customer service helps on weekdays 10:00–15:00. Get in touch by email or phone.
contactPage.title: We're here for you
contactPage.subtitle: Do you have questions about our products or your order? Our customer service is happy to help.

faqPage.metaDescription: Answers to the most common questions about products, quality, delivery and storage.
faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.subtitle: We've gathered answers to the most common questions. If you can't find what you're looking for, we're happy to help.
faqPage.a1: All our products are made in a certified factory in Seinäjoki, Finland, following the highest quality standards.
faqPage.q2: How can I be sure of the product's quality?
faqPage.a2: We make the products according to strict quality requirements. All ingredients come from certified suppliers and have been analysed and documented. Robust's products are among the few that contain no magnesium stearate at all.
faqPage.q3: How do I store the products?
faqPage.a3: Store the products in dry room temperature, protected from light. The best-before date is on the back of the jar.
faqPage.a4: We also deliver products to the rest of Europe. Shipping fees vary depending on the destination country.
faqPage.a5: To Finland the delivery time is 1–3 business days and to other EU countries 3–7 business days.
faqPage.q6: Are there allergens in the products?
faqPage.a6: The products are vegan and gluten-free. The production facility handles products containing milk, egg and nuts. More detailed allergen labelling is available per product.
faqPage.ctaSubtitle: Our customer service helps on weekdays 10:00–15:00.

qualityPage.metaDescription: BRCGS AA-certified quality, traceable ingredients and no magnesium stearate. This is how we ensure the purity of our products.
qualityPage.title: Uncompromising quality you can verify
qualityPage.subtitle: For us, quality is not marketing but a promise. Every production batch is tested, and we use only documented ingredients sourced from certified suppliers.
qualityPage.c1Desc: The highest international standard for food safety.
qualityPage.c3Desc: EU directive-compliant traceability for all ingredients.
qualityPage.c4Desc: Unlike most competitors, we don't use unnecessary excipients.
qualityPage.c5Desc: Clean formulations suitable for many kinds of diets.

quiz.metaTitle: Find Your Product Quiz | Robust Nordic
quiz.metaDescription: Answer a few questions about your wellbeing and find the Robust Nordic supplements that suit you. A personal recommendation in under a minute.
quiz.introTitle: Find the products that suit you
quiz.introText: Answer five short questions about your wellbeing and daily life. We'll recommend the Robust Nordic products that suit you best based on your personal profile.
quiz.resultsText: We chose the recommendations based on your answers. Start with the most important and complement as needed.

legal.paymentIntro: We offer flexible and secure payment methods so that shopping is easy.
legal.kopvillkorMeta: Robust Nordic's general purchase and subscription terms (in Swedish).
legal.kopvillkorIntro: General purchase and subscription terms applying to agreements on the delivery of products to consumers in Sweden.

payment.intro: We offer several secure and convenient payment methods in our online store. All payments are processed via a secure connection, and your card details are not stored in our systems.
payment.cardsText: You can pay for your order with the most common debit and credit cards, such as Visa, Visa Electron, Mastercard and American Express. The payment is charged at the time of ordering.
payment.mobilepayText: Pay quickly and securely with your phone using the MobilePay app. You confirm the payment on your own device in a few seconds.
payment.banksText: We support the online payment buttons of all Finnish banks, including OP, Nordea, Danske Bank, S-Pankki, Säästöpankki, POP Pankki, Aktia, Handelsbanken and Ålandsbanken.
payment.klarnaText: Through Klarna you can pay by invoice or split the payment into several installments. Choose your preferred Klarna payment method at checkout and follow the app's instructions.
payment.securityText: All payment transactions are protected with SSL encryption. Payment processing is handled by a trusted payment provider, and sensitive data always travels via an encrypted connection.
payment.contactText: If you have questions about payment, please contact our customer service at asiakaspalvelu@robustnordic.fi or on 050 372 0007.
